title: The Program That Won't Install
ticket: Mike needs a browser update but the installer keeps failing.
clue: The installer source and permissions matter.
tooltip: Use trusted installers and verify the app in Settings > Apps.
whyItMatters: Unsafe installs create malware and broken systems.
careerConnection: Endpoint support safely installs and removes approved tools.

actionTask.instructions: Install one approved app, open it, and verify it appears in the Apps list.
actionTask.expectedResult: The app installs and launches correctly.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Settings > Apps listing the installed application.

repeatTask: Install and uninstall another safe app with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Leave a broken shortcut behind after uninstall, then clean it up.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Mike can use the app and the install process is documented.
